headline: ISRG vs. ABT: Which MedTech Giant Is the Smarter Investment Now?
summary: ISRG's expanding robotic surgery ecosystem and innovation pipeline give it an edge over Abbott for investors seeking stronger long-term MedTech growth.

headline: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) Earnings Drew Fresh Attention, Is It Still Below Fair Value?
summary: Abbott Laboratories earnings put recent stock moves in context Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is back in focus after its latest quarterly earnings, where higher year over year sales came alongside lower net income and earnings per share, sharpening attention on upcoming estimates. See our latest analysis for Abbott Laboratories.
